class.name: E3DModel
class.brief_description: Resource representing a parsed MaSzyna E3D model.
class.description: [E3DModel] is a resource that stores the complete hierarchical structure of a MaSzyna [code].e3d[/code] model. It acts as a container for the root [E3DSubModel] components. This resource is designed to be serialized into Godot's native [code].res[/code] format by the [ResourceCache] to optimize subsequent loading times by avoiding repeated binary parsing.

members.member: A list of top-level [E3DSubModel] resources that form the root of the model's hierarchy.
